title: Define recovery algorithm & torn-state policy
summary: Finalize deterministic recovery logic and torn-state resolution rules for 0.4.0, including semantic resume intent handling.
acceptance_criteria: Recovery algorithm steps are enumerated and deterministic.
Torn-state detection and resolution rules are explicit.
Rules cover invalid/stale materialized state vs event log precedence.
Terminal vs non-terminal transaction selection is defined.
Next-action derivation rules include semantic intent handling.

steps.description: Enumerate recovery algorithm steps from load → validate → rebuild → select → resume.
Define torn-state detection rules and precedence between event log and materialized state.
Specify next_action derivation rules including semantic intent handling.
Write the recovery algorithm specification document.

notes: Align with Sections 6 and 7 of plan.md.
Ensure compatibility with transaction lifecycle invariants.
